wire_ground_truth.timestamps: Unix epoch float, fields named start_utc / end_utc
wire_ground_truth.gps: route_chunk envelopes, separate from workout header, join on workout_uuid

metrics.name: HRV Coefficient of Variation
metrics.sql: STDDEV_SAMP(value) OVER w7 / AVG(value) OVER w7
metrics.purpose: ANS stability. High = nervous system swinging erratically between stress and recovery.

metrics.name: Acute-to-Chronic Workload Ratio
metrics.purpose: Injury prevention. Flags recent load spikes above chronic baseline.

metrics.name: Training Monotony Index
metrics.purpose: Detects same-intensity training every day. High = plateau or overuse risk.

metrics.name: Nightly RHR Dip Amplitude
metrics.formula: dip = (avg_hr(08:00–22:00 local) - min_hr(start_utc of inBed to end_utc of last asleep)) / avg_hr(08:00–22:00 local)
metrics.purpose: Flat nocturnal dip = alcohol, late eating, or acute illness.

metrics.name: RHR Trajectory Slope
metrics.formula: slope = cov(day_index_0_to_6, rhr_value) / var(day_index_0_to_6) over 7d rolling window
metrics.sql: REGR_SLOPE(value, day_index) OVER (ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)
metrics.purpose: Leading indicator of accumulating fatigue or illness before subjective symptoms appear.

metrics.name: Heart Rate Recovery Decay
metrics.purpose: Fitness proxy. Low HRR = sympathetic dominance or overtraining.
metrics.notes: Requires HR sample captured in the 60s window after workout.end_utc. Missing if watch removed.

metrics.name: Cardiovascular Drift

wire_inputs.note: separate envelope, join on workout_uuid, derive speed = dist_delta_m / time_delta_s per point

metrics.purpose: Dehydration or fatigue during steady-state cardio.
metrics.notes: Skip if route_chunks not received or speed variance filter fails.

metrics.name: Orthostatic Stress Proxy
formula: wake_utc = max(end_utc of all asleep samples for the night)
metrics.purpose: Detects poor recovery, dehydration, or high cortisol.

metrics.name: Sleep Regularity Index
formula: Build per-minute binary vector for each day: 1 if any asleep sample covers that minute, 0 otherwise.
metrics.purpose: Sleep schedule consistency. Low SRI predicts metabolic disruption.

metrics.name: Sleep Architecture Efficiency
formula: deep_rem_s = sum(end_utc - start_utc for samples where category_value IN (4,5))
in_bed_s = sum(end_utc - start_utc for samples where category_value == 0)
metrics.purpose: Penalizes time-in-bed without restorative sleep. Ignores generic asleep (category_value=1).
metrics.notes: Deep/REM detection unreliable on pre-Series 9. Tag device in pipeline.

metrics.name: Sleep Debt Accumulator
formula: actual_sleep_s = sum(end_utc - start_utc for samples where category_value IN (1,3,4,5))
metrics.purpose: Running decayed sleep deficit. 10%/day decay weights recent nights more heavily.

metrics.name: Sleep Onset Latency Spike
formula: inBed_start = min(start_utc for samples where category_value == 0)
first_asleep_start = min(start_utc for samples where category_value IN (1,3,4,5))
metrics.purpose: Detects difficulty falling asleep. Correlate with metric 16 (blue light) for causation.

metrics.name: Wakefulness After Sleep Onset
formula: first_asleep_utc = min(start_utc for samples where category_value IN (1,3,4,5))
last_asleep_end_utc = max(end_utc for samples where category_value IN (1,3,4,5))
waso_s = sum(end_utc - start_utc for samples where category_value == 2 AND start_utc >= first_asleep_utc AND end_utc <= last_asleep_end_utc)
metrics.purpose: Intra-sleep fragmentation. Awake segments strictly between first and last asleep markers.

metrics.name: Temperature Rhythm Phase Shift
formula: today_peak_utc = start_utc of max(value) sample in today's 24h window
metrics.purpose: Circadian misalignment from travel or schedule disruption.
metrics.notes: Gate on device capability. No data = skip metric.

metrics.name: Social Jetlag Index
formula: inBed_start_utc = min(start_utc for category_value==0 per night)
last_asleep_end_utc = max(end_utc for category_value IN (1,3,4,5) per night)
sji_hours = abs(avg(midpoint, Sat+Sun nights) - avg(midpoint, Mon-Fri nights)) / 60
metrics.purpose: Metabolic disruption from weekend vs weekday sleep drift.

metrics.name: Pre-Bed Digital Stimulation

wire_inputs.note: NOT in wire envelope. Requires DeviceActivityReport framework separately.

formula: inBed_start_utc = min(start_utc for category_value==0 for the night)
blue_light_penalty_min = sum(screen_time_min where session overlaps [window_start_utc, inBed_start_utc])
metrics.purpose: Pre-sleep screen exposure. Correlate directly with sol_zscore (metric 12).

metrics.name: Acoustic Allostatic Load
formula: load = sum((value - 75) * sample_duration_hours for samples where value > 75)
metrics.purpose: Cumulative harmful noise. High load days = high cortisol days regardless of subjective state.

metrics.name: Sensory Overload Index

wire_inputs.source: daylight_min proxy: HKQuantityTypeIdentifierUVExposure or GPS + solar elevation API

metrics.purpose: Mental burnout from environment even when physical metrics look fine.

metrics.name: Contextual Stress Peak
formula: Bucket all samples into 5-min windows by floor(start_utc / 300) * 300
stress_windows = count(windows where avg_hr > 90 AND sum_steps < 10 AND (avg_noise > 80 OR screen_active == true))
metrics.purpose: Sedentary stress events (meetings, traffic, gaming) not caused by exercise.

metrics.name: Digital Eye Strain
formula: Sort screen sessions by start time
Split into blocks where gap between consecutive sessions > 300s
max_block_min = max(sum of session durations within each block) / 60
metrics.purpose: Longest unbroken screen session. Triggers 20-20-20 rule reminder.

metrics.name: Light Deficit Accumulator

wire_inputs.source: daylight_min proxy: HKQuantityTypeIdentifierUVExposure or GPS+solar-elevation API

metrics.purpose: Cumulative daylight deficit. Suppresses melatonin and sleep pressure.

metrics.name: Sedentary Fragmentation Rate
formula: total_sleep_s = sum(end_utc - start_utc for category_value IN (0,1,2,3,4,5))
metrics.purpose: Movement distribution through the day. Low = prolonged sitting.

metrics.name: Respiratory Rate Baseline Deviation
metrics.priority: HIGH — most reliable early illness signal. Prioritize in agent prompts.
metrics.purpose: RR is extremely stable in health. Any deviation flags infection or severe exhaustion.
metrics.grain: daily, resting or overnight samples preferred

metrics.name: SpO2 Desaturation Density
formula: desats = count(oxygenSaturation samples where value < 0.94 AND start_utc BETWEEN sleep_start_utc AND sleep_end_utc)
metrics.purpose: Sleep apnea proxy. Only overnight samples count.

metrics.name: Body Mass Volatility
metrics.purpose: High week-to-week mass swings = water/glycogen flux, not fat. Prevents misinterpretation.

metrics.name: MET Intensity Minutes
metrics.purpose: Translates calorie burn into standardized cardiovascular activity compliance.
metrics.grain: per workout, aggregate daily and weekly

metrics.name: VO2 Max Moving Derivative
metrics.purpose: Detects active detraining before performance decline is felt.
metrics.notes: Apple vo2Max is estimated from HR+pace, not lab-measured. Surface caveat in agent output.

metrics.name: Pacing Efficiency Index

wire_inputs.note: separate envelope, join on workout_uuid, required for GPS speed filter only

formula: Filter: activity_name IN ('running') OR activity_name IN ('cycling') — compute separately per type, never mix
metrics.purpose: Movement economy. Drop in efficiency signals biomechanical fatigue.

metrics.name: NEAT Proxy
formula: neat_steps = sum(stepCount.value) - sum(stepCount.value where sample.start_utc BETWEEN workout.start_utc AND workout.end_utc)
neat_energy_kcal = sum(activeEnergyBurned.value) - sum(activeEnergyBurned.value where sample.start_utc BETWEEN workout.start_utc AND workout.end_utc)
metrics.alert: neat_energy_kcal < personal_mean_30d - 1_stddev on heavy training days
metrics.purpose: Lifestyle activity outside workouts. Detects training-induced laziness.

metrics.name: Daily Exertion Strain (TRIMP Proxy)
formula: For each 1-min segment within workout window: zone = lookup(avg_hr / maxHR)
trimp = sum(segment_min * zone_multipliers[zone]) across all workouts
metrics.purpose: Single daily strain score (like WHOOP). Integrates duration and intensity across all workouts.
metrics.notes: Requires user_age or explicit maxHR in user profile config.

metrics.name: Systemic Readiness Score
metrics.purpose: Primary morning briefing number. Single recovery vs stress balance score.

metrics.name: Burnout Velocity
formula: burnout_velocity = REGR_SLOPE(burnout_signal, day_index) OVER (ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)
metrics.purpose: Rate of change of combined debt signals. Positive acceleration = approaching crash.

metrics.name: Vagal Tone Rebound
formula: bed_utc = min(start_utc for category_value==0 for the night)
wake_utc = max(end_utc for category_value IN (1,3,4,5) for the night)
hrv_pre_sleep = avg(hrv.value where start_utc BETWEEN bed_utc - 3600 AND bed_utc)
hrv_post_wake = avg(hrv.value where start_utc BETWEEN wake_utc AND wake_utc + 3600)
metrics.interpretation: positive = sleep cleared stress | negative = woke more stressed than sleep onset
metrics.purpose: Single most interpretable nightly recovery signal.

sql_helpers.rolling_mean_7d: AVG(value) OVER (ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)
sql_helpers.rolling_stddev_7d: STDDEV_SAMP(value) OVER (ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)
sql_helpers.rolling_mean_30d: AVG(value) OVER (ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)
sql_helpers.zscore_30d: (value - AVG(value) OVER w30) / NULLIF(STDDEV_SAMP(value) OVER w30, 0)
sql_helpers.ewma_note: DuckDB has no native EWMA. Use recursive CTE or pre-compute via pandas.ewm(span=N, adjust=False)
